errors.nameExists:
Project with name '{{name}}' already exists
Please rename the project in 'project.godot' or remove the existing one.
errors.invalidConfigVersion:
Invalid project.godot config_version.
Only config version 5 is supported
errors.noStableReleases:
No installed Stable releases found for Godot {{version}}.x
Please install a stable release for Godot {{version}}.x, then try adding the project again.
errors.noDotNetRelease: Project seems to be a .NET project but no Editor with .NET release found
errors.noCompatibleRelease: No installed releases found for Godot {{version}}.x that support config_version {{configVersion}}.

messages.noReleasesCta: No releases installed yet. <Link>Go to installs</Link>
messages.waitingForDialog: Waiting for dialog to add project...
messages.needReleaseInstalled: You need at least a release installed to add a project
messages.addProjectError: Something went wrong when adding project
messages.setEditorError: Something went wrong when setting project editor
messages.projectNotValid: Project is not valid, please make sure the project and release are valid on your computer.
messages.invalidReleaseEditor: The selected editor is unavailable. Mount the drive or install the release again.
messages.dropGodotFileOnly: Please drop a project.godot file to add a project
messages.dropProjectHere: Drop project.godot file here to add project

invalidReasons.missingEditor: The selected editor is unavailable. Mount the drive or choose another editor.

messages.recoveredVSCodeConfig: Some VS Code config files were invalid. Godot Launcher recreated them and preserved the originals as .bad copies.

Cannot use a different major version of the editor
To protect your project see official migration guide on https://godotengine.org
